steps.title: Substitute the time
steps.content: The drone's height after $2$ minutes is $f(2)$. Substitute $x=2$ into the function because $x$ represents minutes after the descent begins.

steps.title: Evaluate the height
steps.content:
Now compute the predicted height in feet using the function value at that time.
$$f(2)=-40(2)+340$$
$$f(2)=-80+340$$
$$f(2)=260$$
The answer is B.
